description: dev-workflows plugin hooks. (1) SessionStart env-canary (bash) warns when python is missing from PATH. (2) operational-efficiency-guard-claude.ps1 (pwsh) on PreToolUse(Bash) + UserPromptSubmit is the Claude Code companion to the Codex/OMX-wired operational-efficiency-guard.ps1 — same operational checks, but reads stdin and emits hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext so warnings surface to the model instead of dying on stderr. All warning-only, exit 0. The Codex guard is intentionally NOT wired here (it runs via ~/.codex/hooks/omx-native-hook-windows-shim.ps1).
